transcript.text:
Hello everyone~
Today, I have pizza, 2 large-size pork feet,
And also fried chicken
I have a special guest today
Come on out!
I told you I didn't want to do something like this
[A very familiar voice..?]
Hello
She looks just like me, right?
It's my little sister
You introduce yourself
Hello, my name is Tzuhyang
[non-chalant]
Stop laughing
[Nods]
A lot of people have been saying that I'm a triplet

Yes, you guys are correct
We switch off for mukbangs
This is my little sister Tzuhyang
[Tzuhyang (2nd child) Very Shy]
[My mom's naming skills]
I will be doing a mukbang with my sister
Bon appetit Bon appetit
[Tzuyang starts first]
[Awkward]
[Do I just start eating..?]
Where did you order this pork feet from?
Gajok (brand)
It's delicious
[Hungry]
[Got the chopsticks]
It doesn't smell at all

Tasty
It tastes so good
[Slow]
Why are you so hesitant?
I can't eat as much as you
[You..?]
Please control yourself
[That's not easy]
You embarrass me
[I do?]
Okay
But thanks to me, you get to eat delicious food
[You ungrateful]
The pizza...
Is she going to talk about it?
Yes, eat it

[She wanted some pizza]
Before it gets cold
[Well then if you insist]
[Tzuhyang starts the official mukbang now]
Why aren't you eating the shrimp tails?
Who eats the tails?
[You don't know how to eat!]
The cheese is going to get hard
I think it's already hard Okay, I'll eat it
A big slice
There are 3 shrimps in here
Yum
Give it to me if you can't finish it
[Shrimp tail is the best]
[1 slice of pizza each]
Hey

Why didn't you come home yesterday?
Well
My friends
[Sigh]
It was a Friday night
Please grow up
My friends wanted to keep hanging out
And it was a Friday night
And it's been a while since I last had a sleepover
[Only if I was born 30 seconds earlier!]
I'm considered really mature for my age
Mind your own business
All you do is stay home
It's because I work from home
Delicious
Hurry up and eat (Be quiet)

I'm full already
Already?
You didn't even eat that much
You're the weird person
This is how much a normal person eats
[Really..?]
Eat some vegetables too
I do.. sometimes..
Mom always tells you to eat your veggies
I almost put the fried chicken inside the lettuce wrap
Where's my pig feet? [As she picks 1 up]
[Born 30 seconds earlier but still listens to her little sister]
[Serious]
It tastes good
But unni.. [older sister]
You eat so much every time

What?
I've always been like this
But when you first started mukbang, you asked me to take over when you were full
Hey, why are you saying that here?
I guess I've improved over the years
[She is bloated]
I'm so full
If you're done eating, text mom and see where she's at
Mom?
Okay
[Mom, where are you? Tzuyang ordered so much delivery food]
[Mom: What? She told me to to-go 10 servings of Spicy Rice Cake]
What did mom say? [Where is my Spicy Rice Cake?]
My stomach hurts [Tries to escape]
What's wrong?
I'm going to use the restroom

Mom will be here soon
[Left alone]
What is this?
You were home?
Where did Tzuhyang go?
She just went to the restroom
What's with your voice?
I'm going through puberty
Gross
[Tzoyang (3rd child) Puberty at age 24]
Right, this is
someone I did not want to introduce
It's my other little sister
What is this? It's so tasty
I am Tzuyang's youngest sister, Tzoyang
I can't possibly continue eating because of you

Were you going somewhere?
Yes, to see my boyfriend
Unni,
Give me some money
I gave you some yesterday
Give it to me
Fine, I'll send it to you
Go away if you're done eating
[Mission Accomplished]
Be safe and don't be late
You're back?
What is this? What happened to my food?
Tzoyang ate some
She came by?
Did you wash your hands?
I don't see any water

[Cleans it now]
I didn't
Go wash your hands
Nah
I can't eat anymore
You ate all of that?
[Watching her mukbang]
Whenever I see you eat the bones..
Who eats the bone like that?
This is the best part
[She is getting full just from watching her]
Does your stomach hurt again?
It keeps hurting
I'm going to use the restroom again
Yeah go ahead
Okay

You can have the rest of the food
[Say less]
This is a lot of food still
I'm going to watch a movie
[Were you guys fooled~?]
[Tzuyang being a Triplet is a RUMOR]
[Excited Tzuyan=Brain Storming=Her own grave]
[Embarrassment is tripled]
[Thanks for watching]
Subtitles by Hyun Choi antharoni@gmail.com
